messages.content: Story set in Supergirl tv show. Story about Lena Luthor & Nicolas. romance & sensual undertoneNicolas description for references: 1m78, and a bit overweight, short skipy brown hairs & brown eyes behind glasses. He doesn’t grow past his shyness & awkward way with Lena. He is just a delivery guy new in town. Taking cooking class with Alex Danvers. Lena Luthor is more assertive in this story & don’t second guess on her desires. Lena finds refreshing that someone doesn’t seem to care about her family name . She will be the one initiating each step in their growing relationship. Lena Luthor is finding herself in a journey to slowly seduce Nicolas. He is a breath of fresh hair for her even if he only manages to say « hello » and « have a good day to her ». Nicolas never get past his shy & akward demeanor with Lena . It is something she find alluring. Lena find herself curious about this man that doesn’t recognize her when he has a delivery for her. Write their fist meeting.

Lena was in her office, typing away at her computer as she heard a knock on the door. "Come in," she called out, not bothering to look up from her work.

The door opened and in walked a man with a delivery box in his hands. "Delivery for Lena Luthor," he said, his voice soft and timid.

Lena finally looked up and caught sight of the man in front of her. He was a bit overweight and had short, stubby brown hair. But there was something about him that caught her attention. Maybe it was his shy demeanor or the way he nervously shifted from one foot to the other.

"Thank you," Lena said, standing up from her desk and approaching him to take the box. "Is there anything else you need?"

"N-no, ma'am," he stammered. "Just sign here, please."

Lena did as he asked, handing the pen back to him. "Thank you again," she said, smiling at him.

He returned the smile before quickly turning on his heel and leaving the room.

Lena stared after him for a moment, feeling a strange sense of attraction towards him. She couldn't explain it, but there was something about this delivery man that she found intriguing.

As the days went by, Lena found herself purposely ordering things just so she could see Nicolas again. It was like a strange game that she couldn't help but play.

Eventually, Lena decided to enroll in the cooking class that Nicolas was also attending, hoping to get to know him better. She was surprised to find that he was just as shy and awkward as he was during their first meeting.

But Lena wasn't deterred. She found herself taking charge in their conversations, asking him questions and making him laugh with her witty remarks.

As they spent more time together, Lena discovered that Nicolas didn't care about her family name or her status in society. He was more interested in getting to know her as a person, and Lena found that refreshing.

Their relationship grew slowly, with Lena taking the lead in each step they took. But even though Nicolas remained shy and awkward, Lena found herself drawn to him more and more each day.

They may have started off as strangers who barely spoke two words to each other, but Lena and Nicolas were now on a journey towards a romance filled with sensuality and passion.

Lena & the danvers sister look for nicolas on social medias. They finds silly pics of him for the Course des Heros with females friends & the young daughter of a couple. they find he participated for the French Association on Rett Syndrome. they also find more about him & learn he is, indeed, french. And bad at cooking. Alex confirm Nicolas is a disaster in a kitchen. The girls tease Lena while she invit Nicolas. Then a bit more when Nicolas send a « sos for an upcoming date » to Alex. Alex grin while sharing this with Lena.

Lena and the Danvers sisters were scrolling through social media, trying to find any information they could on Nicolas. Lena was particularly interested and had been thinking about him constantly over the last few days.

Suddenly, Alex let out a laugh. "What is it?" Lena asked, looking over her shoulder.

"I found some pictures of Nicolas participating in the Course des Heros," Alex said, showing Lena the picture on her phone. "Looks like he's quite the athlete."

Lena couldn't help but smile as she looked at the picture. It showed Nicolas grinning from ear to ear while standing next to a group of female friends and the young daughter of a couple. He looked happy and carefree, and Lena found herself feeling a little jealous of the people in the picture.

"But that's not all," Kelly chimed in, holding up her phone. "It looks like he participated to support the French Association on Rett Syndrome. He's got a big heart, Lena."

Lena felt her heart swell with pride as she looked at the picture on Kelly's phone. Nicolas may be awkward and shy, but he was also kind and compassionate.

"Okay, now this one is just too good to pass up," Alex said, holding up her phone. "Apparently, he's a terrible cook!"

Lena burst out laughing as she looked at the picture of Nicolas standing in front of a stove, looking like he had no idea what he was doing. "That doesn't surprise me," she said, still giggling. "He's always seemed a little clueless."

Alex grinned mischievously. "So, are you going to invite him over for dinner and teach him how to cook?" she teased Lena.

Lena rolled her eyes playfully. "Maybe I will," she said, feeling a rush of excitement at the thought of spending more time with Nicolas.

A few days later, Alex received a message from Nicolas asking for advice on an upcoming date. She couldn't help but grin as she shared the message with Lena.

"Looks like he's seeking your approval, Lena," Alex said with a wink.

Lena blushed and pretended to roll her eyes, but deep down she couldn't help but feel a little flattered. She couldn't wait to see what the future held for her and Nicolas.
Akward date, lot of stutter from Nicolas, he doest really know what to say or how to act.

Lena arrived at the restaurant where she was supposed to meet Nicolas, feeling a little nervous about how the date would go. She found Nicolas sitting at a table, looking just as awkward and shy as ever. 

"Hi," Lena said with a smile, sitting down across from him.

"Hi," Nicolas replied, his voice barely above a whisper.

The conversation between them was stilted and awkward. Nicolas seemed to have trouble finding the right words and kept stuttering nervously. Lena tried to keep the conversation going, but it felt like they were both struggling to come up with anything interesting to say.

As the night went on, Lena couldn't help but feel disappointed. She had been so sure that Nicolas was the one for her, but now she wasn't so sure. He seemed so different from the confident and assertive guys she was used to dating.

As the night came to an end, Lena and Nicolas said their goodbyes. Lena left the restaurant feeling a little deflated and unsure of what to do next.

It was only later, after reflecting on the evening, that Lena realized her expectations had been too high. Nicolas was just being himself, and that was okay. Maybe he wasn't the smooth, confident guy she was used to, but he had other qualities that were just as important.

Lena decided to give Nicolas another chance, to see if they had a connection that went beyond words. She could tell he had a good heart, and that was something she was willing to take a chance on.
Lena give Nicolas another chance & realise that him being akward & shy is a part of his charm. they talk a bit about past relationship & their expectation for the future.

The next time Lena and Nicolas went out, she approached the evening with a different mindset. She reminded herself that being shy and awkward was just a part of Nicolas's personality, and that it was something she could grow to love.

As they sat down for dinner, Lena decided to steer the conversation in a different direction. She asked Nicolas about his previous relationships, curious to know more about his past.

Nicolas hesitated for a moment before opening up and telling Lena about his experiences with dating. He revealed that he had always struggled to connect with women, always feeling like he was never good enough for them.

Lena felt a pang of sympathy for him, and realized that they had a lot in common. She had also struggled in past relationships, feeling like she always had to put up a façade to be what her partners wanted her to be.

As the night went on, Lena and Nicolas talked about their hopes and expectations for the future. They discovered that they both wanted the same things out of life: love, happiness, and a sense of fulfillment.

Lena found that she enjoyed Nicolas's quiet, thoughtful personality. He was a good listener and wasn't afraid to open up and be vulnerable with her. It was refreshing to be with someone who didn't always feel like they had to put on a show.

By the end of the night, Lena felt a renewed sense of hope for their relationship. Maybe Nicolas wasn't the smoothest talker or the most confident guy she had ever been with, but he was kind, gentle, and cared about her for who she truly was.

She realized that sometimes, the things we think are our flaws can actually be our greatest strengths. And that was something she could definitely learn to love about Nicolas.

As their next date approach, Lena feels ready to push for more. In their intimacy as much as in their relationship. She wants a meaningful relationship and feels like Nicolas will respect her pace.
He open up a bit more about his past, toxic, relationship & his fear of messing up things with Lena.

As Lena and Nicolas planned their next date, she felt a sense of courage building within her. She knew that she wanted to push for more in both their intimacy and their relationship, but also didn't want to push too hard or too fast. 

She decided to talk to him about it, making it clear that she respected his boundaries and wanted to move forward at a pace that they were both comfortable with.

Nicolas listened attentively to Lena, and as they talked, he began to open up more about his past. He revealed that he had been in toxic relationships in the past, which had left him feeling insecure and fearful of messing things up with her.

Lena felt a rush of empathy for him, and could see how much he wanted to make things work between them. She knew that it was going to take time, patience, and understanding, but she was willing to work through it with him.

As the night went on, Lena and Nicolas continued to talk about their hopes and dreams for the future. She felt a deep connection between them growing, and was thrilled to see that he shared her desire for a meaningful relationship.

Lena found herself admiring Nicolas's gentle nature, and the way he always put her needs before his own. She could see that he was genuinely interested in getting to know her on a deeper level, and it made her feel incredibly special.

As the end of the night approached, Lena made a decision - she wanted to take their relationship to the next level. She leaned in closer to Nicolas, and with a flutter of her heart, she took his hand in hers. 

For a moment, they sat there in silence as they looked into each other's eyes. Lena knew that she was ready for more, and she hoped that Nicolas was too.

Nicolas is feeling bolder himself &, with Lena taking his hand, turn more toward her. he lean forward, letting her decide if she really want this or not. he lean more toward her. for a kiss. if lena is willing.

Lena felt her heart racing as Nicolas leaned in towards her. She could feel the warmth of his breath on her face, and she knew what was going to happen next.

Without hesitation, she leaned in too, meeting his lips with her own. As they kissed, Lena felt a rush of emotion as she realized that she had finally found what she was searching for. In Nicolas, she had found someone who understood her, accepted her, and loved her for who she truly was.

Nicolas responded eagerly to the kiss, his hand wrapping around the back of her neck as he deepened it. Lena felt heat spreading through her body, and she could feel her own hunger growing with each passing second.

As they parted, Lena looked deeply into Nicolas's eyes. She felt nervous but also knew that they were both on the same page about what was happening between them.

"This feels right," Nicolas said, his voice barely above a whisper.

"I know," Lena replied, smiling brightly. "I've been waiting for this for a long time."

In that moment, Lena knew that she had made the right decision. With Nicolas, she had found the love and connection that she had been longing for. And she knew that, together, they could face anything that came their way.
"Say, wants to go on a walk ?" Nicolas propose, feeling giddy.

"Actually, I would love that," Lena replied, grinning back at him. 

They left the restaurant and started walking, hand in hand, under the stars. Lena could feel the cool breeze on her skin, but the warmth of Nicolas's hand was enough to make her feel completely at ease.

As they walked, they talked about everything and nothing at the same time. They talked about their dreams, their past experiences, and their hopes for the future. There was a sense of comfort and security between them that made Lena feel like she could tell him anything.

Nicolas had a way of making her feel safe and accepted, and she realized that this was what she had been missing in her previous relationships. She had always felt like she had to put on a façade to be what her partners wanted her to be, but with Nicolas, she could be herself completely.

As they walked, Lena leaned in closer to Nicolas, feeling an intense connection between them. She could tell that something special was growing between them, and she knew that it was only the beginning.

"I feel like I've been waiting for you my entire life," Lena said softly, looking up into Nicolas's eyes.

Nicolas smiled back at her, his eyes tender and full of emotion. "I feel the same way," he replied, squeezing her hand gently.

In that moment, Lena knew that she had found the love of her life, and she felt nothing but gratitude and happiness in her heart.
Nicolas take off his vest & put it around Lena. Its cliche, he knows, but it feel right too. he also wrap her into his arm.

As they continued walking, Nicolas felt a sudden chill in the air. He took off his vest and draped it around Lena's shoulders, wanting to make sure that she was warm.

"I'm sorry, it's not much," he said, feeling a little embarrassed.

Lena smiled up at him, feeling a wave of gratitude wash over her. "It's perfect. Thank you," she replied, huddling closer to him.

Nicolas wrapped his arm around Lena, pulling her into a tight embrace. Lena felt a sense of safety and comfort in his arms, and she knew that this was where she belonged.

They continued walking, the only sound coming from their footsteps and the occasional rustle of wind in the trees. Lena felt like everything was perfect in that moment, like the rest of the world didn't matter.

As they walked, Lena realized that she had finally found what she had been searching for all along. In Nicolas, she had found someone who accepted her for who she was, who loved her unconditionally, and who made her feel like anything was possible.

She leaned into him, feeling a sense of peace settle over her. In his embrace, she knew that everything was going to be okay.
They share a kiss. both are feeling possessive yet tentative.

The wind picked up a bit, sending strands of Lena's hair blowing into Nicoals's face. Without thinking, he reached up to gently tuck them behind her ear, his fingers lingering on her cheek for just a moment too long.

In that moment, he realized that he didn't want to let her go, that he wanted to keep her close forever. Lena felt similarly - she was overwhelmed by emotions, feeling giddy and hopeful yet tentative.

She looked up at him, meeting his gaze. Time seemed to stop as their eyes locked and an invisible force pulled them together. When they finally kissed, it was slow and passionate, a celebration of the connection they had found with each other.

Both Lena and Nicolas felt possessive over each other, wanting to claim and protect the other. But they also felt tentative, still navigating the newness and vulnerability of their relationship.

As they parted, they rested their foreheads against each other, breathing heavily. Lena traced small circles on Nicolas's chest with her fingers, savoring the warmth and comfort of his embrace.

In that moment, Lena knew that she had found something truly special, and she was determined to hold onto it with everything she had.
"lets get you home, i wouldnt want you to be ill"

Nicolas noticed Lena shivering a little bit despite the jacket he had given her. "You're cold, let's get you home," he said, taking her hand in his.

Lena nodded, feeling a little embarrassed for shaking like that. She was grateful for Nicolas's concern, though.

They walked back to Lena's place, chatting about anything and everything along the way. By the time they arrived, Lena was feeling more comfortable around Nicolas and more at ease with their growing relationship.

"Thank you for tonight," Lena said, as she turned towards Nicolas to say goodbye.

"Of course," Nicolas replied, smiling back at her. "I had a great time."

Lena felt a sudden rush of emotion as she looked into Nicolas's eyes. There was a warmth and tenderness there that made her feel giddy and hopeful all at once.

"I'll see you soon?" she asked hopefully.

"Absolutely," Nicolas replied, reaching out to tuck a strand of hair behind her ear. "I'll be thinking about you until then."

Lena felt her heart skip a beat at Nicolas's words. Everything about him seemed to be so perfect, so comforting, and so right. She knew that there would be tough times ahead, but with Nicolas by her side, she felt like she could face anything.
despite herself, Lena cant seem to let Nicolas go just yet.

As Lena watched Nicolas turn and walk away, she felt a sudden urge to chase after him, to spend just a little more time together.

She didn't want to be clingy or needy, but she also didn't want to leave things to chance. She needed to get closer to Nicolas and deepen the connection they had.

Without hesitation, Lena made a decision. She quickly jogged after Nicolas, catching up to him just as he reached the end of the block.
